_sources.device_power: Huang et al., MobiSys 2012. Idle RRC_Idle=0.59W, peak TX=3.0W, peak RX=1.2W. (FASE 3) RRC/DRX state machine: IDLE_DEEP (0.59W) → CONNECTED_ACTIVE (peaks) → CONNECTED_TAIL (1.29W for T_inactivity=5s) → IDLE_DEEP. Promotion cost 0.26J per IDLE→CONNECTED transition.
_sources.infra_power: EARTH Auer et al. 2011. Macro eNB: P_0=712.2 W (idle), slope 14.5 → P_max ≈ 1292 W. Configured as: idle_w=712.2, tx_w=580 (increment for DL), rx_w=0 (DL-dominated). Q1 energy from ns-3 LENA eNB with idle-baseline subtraction. NOTE: normalized by single-UE airtime, not 150 Mbps cell-capacity amortization.
_sources.infra_energy_per_byte_j: DEPRECATED (was 1350 W / 150 Mbps = 72e-6 J/byte). Replaced by Q1 incremental model + idle-baseline subtraction.
